title: Extending the provisions of the Metro Railways (Operation and Maintenance) Act, 2002 to the Metropolitan areas of Agra and Meerut
description: Extending the provisions of the Metro Railways (Operation and Maintenance) Act, 2002 to the Metropolitan areas of Agra and Meerut
